mapper.select: select id, seller_id, category, name, description, price, wechat, address, status, create_time, update_time from product where category = #{category} and status = '已上架' order by create_time desc, id desc
select id from product where status = '已上架' and name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by create_time desc, id desc
select id, seller_id, category, name, description, price, wechat, address, status, create_time, update_time from product where id = #{id} and status = '已上架'
select id, seller_id, category, name, description, price, wechat, address, status, create_time, update_time from product where id = #{id} and seller_id = #{sellerId}
mapper.insert: insert into product ( seller_id, category, name, description, price, wechat, address, status ) values ( #{sellerId}, #{category}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{wechat}, #{address}, #{status} )
